commit.subject: LU-17814 utils: Add min/max depth support
commit.message:
LU-17814 utils: Add min/max depth support

Add min/max depth support for pfind.

Test-Parameters: forjanitoronly
Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
